expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。 [Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板材的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板材的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้บน ล่าง และข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้อันหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày ván phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang pagsukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal sa Itaas, Ilalim at Gilid na Tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Likurang Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကျွဲစည်းဖို့ဘုတ်များအရွယ်အစားတွက်ချက်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ဆိုသည်မှာ စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် ခေါင်၊ အောက်ခြေ၊ နှင့် ဘေးဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតុល្យភាពសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាវាស់ៈវែងសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈថាសខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងផ្នែកចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈថាសខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄສ່ຂະໜາດແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືຂະໜາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນດ້ານເທິງ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນຂ້າງຫລັງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法、[BoardThick]は上板、底板、および側面板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背景板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재질 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieures, inférieures et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
